cards.hook: Sony is killing physical discs on every PS5 game by 2028
cards.caption: Sony's ending disc production for all PS5 games by 2028. Layoffs, Hollywoodification, no ownership. The industry take my feed surfaced before the timeline caught it.
cards.stance: Ending physical discs isn't progress, it's revoking ownership from the people who kept gaming alive.

cards.hook: PlayStation and Xbox will drown in AI slop. Nintendo and PC won't.
cards.caption: The call: Sony and MS push AI slop until it stops paying, then die; Nintendo and PC just keep doing their thing. Sharp industry take my feed kept from the noise.
cards.stance: The console generation is over. Nintendo and PC are the only survivors left standing.

cards.hook: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 just got its reveal trailer
cards.caption: MW4 is real: 'Warfare without limits,' PS5, October 23 2026. The reveal that hit my feed before the hype cycle. Every platform, one feed, zero noise.

cards.hook: SGDQ says touch grass and watch the World Cup
This AI turns a text prompt into a playable 2D/3D game. No code.
cards.caption: Seele AI: type a prompt, get a playable game, zero coding. A generative engine built for game dev, not just chat. The frontier drop my feed caught on launch day.
cards.stance: Prompt-to-playable-game is the moment AI stops assisting devs and starts replacing the toolchain.

cards.hook: Fumito Ueda's next game is an Xbox open-world exclusive: gen ATLAS
cards.caption: The mind behind ICO and Shadow of the Colossus goes open-world on Xbox with gen ATLAS. The reveal my feed surfaced before the timeline lost its mind.

cards.hook: The Xenomorph is back: Alien Isolation 2 just got revealed
cards.caption: Alien Isolation 2 is official at Summer of Gaming. Get stalked by the Xenomorph again. The reveal my feed caught the second it dropped, before the timeline noise.

cards.hook: Consoles have been dead since the late 80s. PC just won.
cards.caption: The take: there's already a huge base on owned hardware and 'okay' PC rigs. Focus there. Console generations are basically over. The hot take my feed kept from the noise.
cards.stance: Console generations have been dead since the late 80s; the install base was always the real platform.
